name: Cocoa Almond Cut-Out Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter, sweetened condensed milk, eggs, vanilla extract, and almond extract until well blended.
2. Gradually combine the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and baking soda with the butter mixture, beating until just mixed.
3. Stir in the chopped almonds.
4. Divide the dough into 4 equal portions. Wrap each portion in plastic wrap and flatten into disks. Chill until firm enough to roll out, about 2 hours.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Remove one disk of dough from the refrigerator at a time. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
7. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters. Place the cookies on a lightly greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes, or until set.
9. Remove from the oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Optionally, drizzle with chocolate glaze.
